CVE-2024-42845.title: An eval Injection vulnerability in the component invesalius/reade ...
CVE-2024-42845.summary: An eval Injection vulnerability in the component invesalius/reader/dicom.py of InVesalius 3.1.99991 through 3.1.99998 allows attackers to execute arbitrary code via loading a crafted DICOM file.
